supply_chain.dependencies: Single sources of supply for certain castings, motors and other select engineered components
risks: Limited number of long-term contracts with suppliers
Natural disasters or pandemics affecting supply chain
Large or rapid increases in cost of raw materials
Substantial decreases in availability of raw materials

regulatory_risks: Environmental regulations (air emissions, water discharges, waste management, workplace safety)
U.S. Foreign Corrupt Practices Act compliance
Data privacy requirements (including EU Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive)
International labor laws and work councils
Trade restrictions and tariffs (including changes in U.S. trade policy)
FDA approval requirements (for life sciences products)
Tax law changes (including OECD Pillar 2 global minimum tax)
Anti-ESG policies and legislation in certain U.S. states

sanction_risks: Potential nationalization of private enterprises in China
Currency controls and devaluations in foreign countries
